title: Maleficium: Vampires, Magic & More!
description: Adds magic and vampires into Minecraft.
body:
![maleficium banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58d6402a95d140d3c370dff651f16e7c2e8cd517.png)
# Maleficium: Vampires, Magic & More!
Welcome to Maleficium! This mod adds magic and vampires into Minecraft, allowing players to hone their magical abilities or become a creature of the night. The choice is yours!

## Supporting the project
I know that it's a big ask, but if you like the mod and want to support it, please consider [supporting me on Patreon](https://patreon.com/mitlit). This will help me continue to work on this mod and other projects in the future. If you can't support me financially, please consider sharing the mod with your friends. Thanks for playing my mod!

## Fabric Support
Creating a proper/full fabric port is on my to-do list but as of now I have tested and it is possible to run the mod on fabric via the [Kilt](https://modrinth.com/mod/kilt) project.

## Main Features
<details>
<summary>Witchcraft - Dominate your world by learning spells, rituals, and more!</summary>

### Witchcraft
*Dominate your world by learning spells, rituals, and more!*

Witchcraft has been added to the mod and the grimoires, etc but I haven't written about it here yet. I have written the vampirism and in-game documentation sections though. 
</details>
<details>
<summary>Vampirism - Become a creature of the night and feast on the blood of your enemies!</summary>

## Vampirism
*Become a creature of the night and feast on the blood of your enemies!*

### Abilities

#### Bloodsucking
![vampire fangs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7856aec2851bc0687e3c29510983fd3c4df84ba5.png)

As a vampire, you now feast on blood to survive. Failing to do so will lead you to either death or desiccation. The amount of blood a mob has is calculated based on the amount of health it has with Villagers being the most **nutritious**.

#### Compulsion
![vampire fangs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7856aec2851bc0687e3c29510983fd3c4df84ba5.png)

A perk of being a vampire is that you can compell mobs to do your bidding. Currently, you can tell almost any mob to follow you and even instruct villagers to offer you lower prices on trades.

#### Fast Travel
![fast travel image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98ba09aa4cb5605dc76025dfcb82774588951f8b.png)

As a vampire, you are able to move at incredible speeds leaving nothing but a black trail in your wake. Please be aware that this ability uses up some of your blood/hunger.

#### Enhanced Senses
![enhanced senses image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07f997070cb521c4d6b909e954bc09517f0b1561.png)

By closing your eyes and utilising your enhanced sense of smell and hearing, you can locate nearby mobs and players along with their species.

#### Feed Blood
![feed blood image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d094e2a5586cc46934c8d5832f0a888d760c1e0.png)

By feeding your blood to other players, they can be turned into vampires too or gain a temporary regen boost. To turn into a vampire, players need to die with the **vampire blood effect** and then drink blood.
</details>
<details>
<summary>In-Game Documentation - Use the in-game grimoires to figure out how the mod works.</summary>

## In-Game Documentation
*Use the in-game grimoires to figure out how the mod works.*

### The Grimoires

#### Crafting Grimoire
![crafting grimoire image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c52bdd7e0eed53780206be8d200b9c11e3660a76.png)

_You obtain this grimoire when you first join the game and it contains important information about the mod such as project links, the Discord server, and crafting recipies._

#### Witchcraft Grimoire
![witchcraft grimoire image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5e2c75a449f5e9a33a25bea07443f62cd2130f5.png)

*The witchcraft grimoire is obtained by combining **1x book** and **1x glowstone dust** inside of a crafting table. This grimoire contains information on the general things you need to know about magic/witchcraft in the Maleficium mod alongside details and guides on how to obtain/use various items and spells.*

#### Vampirism Grimoire
![vampirism grimoire image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d99a63dba05da6ad00e6cd7ffe694a7cd14fcf1.png)

*The vampirism grimoire is obtained by combining **1x book** and **1x rotten flesh** inside of a crafting table. This grimoire contains information on the general things you need to know about becoming, being, and killing vampires in the Maleficium mod alongside details and guides on how to obtain/use various items and tools.*
</details>

**More details can be found in the in-game documentation (grimoires)**
## Compatability
**[Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)** - *required*
- Adds documentation for how features work.

**[TerraBlender](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrablender)** - *required*
- Required for our custom biomes.

**[Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)** - *optional*
- Adds additional slots for modded items such as daylight rings.

**[MCA Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn)** - *optional*
- Turn villagers into vampires.

## Issues/Suggestions
Please report issues and create suggestions on the project's [issue tracker](https://github.com/ItsMitlit/Maleficium/issues)
